what: Log index build metrics (entries, categories, duration)
why: Provide observability into index build performance and coverage

output.console: Build metrics summary: total entries, categories, tags, build duration, skipped entries

success_handling.criteria: Build metrics are collected and logged including entry count, category count, build duration, and any skipped entries

error_handling.criteria: Unable to collect or format build metrics
error_handling.action: Log partial metrics, do not fail the build over metrics reporting

decisions.outcome: Log warning, build still considered successful
